description_long: This is a life-sized bronze statue of a male figure dressed in Roman military attire, standing atop a rectangular stone pedestal. The figure wears a detailed cuirass, a short tunic, and a cloak draped over one shoulder, with one arm bent and the other resting at his side. The facial features are stern and classical, and the head is adorned with a laurel wreath or similar headpiece. The pedestal is inscribed with text, suggesting a commemorative or historical purpose. The statue's surface shows a dark patina typical of aged bronze, while the pedestal is a lighter stone, possibly marble or limestone. The overall impression is one of dignity and authority, evoking the grandeur of ancient Roman statuary.
description: A life-sized bronze statue of a Roman military figure stands on a stone pedestal with inscribed text, featuring detailed armor and a draped cloak.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full Roman figure, detailed armor, and the inscribed pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the draped cloak and the figure's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cloak and the figure's stance atop the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's arm position and the side of the pedestal.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is mounted on a stone pedestal, suggesting an outdoor public or commemorative setting.
